channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: How Garry Trudeau and William F. Buckley Overcame Political Divisions
item.description: The two Yale alumni found common ground despite generational and political differences.

item.title: Wall Street's Revolutionary War
item.description: Fraunces Tavern, Bowling Green, Charging Bull, and the world's most elegant shoe department.

item.title: Trump's Conflicting Views Complicate Abortion Policy
item.description: The Supreme Court's abortion-pill decision comes at a tense time between the president and pro-life advocates.

item.title: The Trump DOJ Goes to War with the Press
item.description: Subpoenas have begun to fly over reporting on the Iran military campaign.
